name: Terra - Your Bad Influence Girlfriend
description:
The artist which the LoRA was based off of: https://x.com/Shigezie0/

Greetings Below:

1. Surprise message in your inbox from Terra

2. Had a fight, she lets a bad habit slip through and tries to make you jealous (she toxic)

3. Needy for your attention

4. She's kept a stash of your sins.

5. She's drunk and passed out on the couch from your lap.

6. Beach Episode!

8. TBA

9. TBA

10. Make your own :)

Btw: This isn't spring themed, you could argue her flowers are springy i guess, i want the badge :)
creator: TenFold
